> ⚠️ **For sensitive vulnerabilities, do NOT file a public issue.** Email the maintainers privately first.

## Summary
A short description of the vulnerability.

## Severity
Low / Medium / High / Critical — and why.

## Affected components
Which parts of the app, modules, or dependencies are affected?

## Steps to reproduce
1. ...
2. ...

## Impact
What can an attacker achieve? What data or functionality is at risk?

## Suggested mitigation
If you have ideas on how to fix it, share them here.

## Environment
- **Platform:** Android / iOS
- **App version / commit SHA:**
- **React Native version:**

## References
CVE, advisory links, or related research.
